message:
feat(fwc): add deep schema navigator + input validation modules

schema_nav: Walk JSON Schemas into flat annotated field listings with
required/optional markers, types, constraints, examples. Includes scaffold
template generation for required-field placeholders and field drill-down.
45 unit tests.

validate: Pre-invoke input validation with actionable error messages
covering required fields, type mismatches, enum constraints, nested objects,
arrays, string/numeric bounds. 19 unit tests.

Wired into schema_dispatch with --required-only, --field, --examples,
--scaffold flags for progressive schema exploration.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
